name: FORRESTER RESEARCH, INC.
business: Forrester Research, Inc. is a global independent research and advisory firm. It delivers research, consulting, and events services to business and technology leaders across functions such as technology, customer experience, digital, marketing, sales, and product. The company's products and services are sold to more than 1,700 client companies worldwide, with no single client accounting for more than 3% of revenues.

exposures.sentence: Our proprietary research, consulting, and events portfolio, combined with our generative AI capabilities, equip clients with trusted insights and advice to help them to go faster, to win, serve and retain customers, and to reduce risk and costs.

Forrester Events focus on business imperatives of significant interest to clients, including business-to-business marketing, sales and product leadership, customer experience, security and risk, and technology and innovation.

catalysts.event: Third amendment of credit facility extending maturity to March 2029
catalysts.sentence: On March 12, 2026, we executed a third amendment of our credit facility that, among other changes, extended the maturity date from December 2026 to March 2029.

catalysts.event: Employee population reduction announced in February 2026
catalysts.sentence: This need is accentuated by actions we have taken to reduce our overall employee population, as announced in January and May 2023, February 2024, January 2025, and February 2026.
